steps.title: Identify the possessives
steps.content: Two possessives are needed: (1) the modeling belongs to multiple astronomers (plural possessive: astronomers'), and (2) the trajectory belongs to the object (singular possessive: object's).

steps.title: Apply the rule
steps.content:
(B) "astronomers' modeling of the object's" gets both possessives right.

(A) misses the plural possessive apostrophe. (C) drops both possessives. (D) uses singular astronomer's when the original meaning is plural.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
